<!-- generated by website/scripts/gen-api-docs.mjs; do not edit -->

Register a method as a DATA-event handler for a graph observe path.

## Import

```ts
import { OnGraphEvent } from "@graphrefly/ts/adapters/nestjs";
```

## Signature

```ts
function OnGraphEvent(nodeName: string): GraphMethodDecorator
```

## Parameters

| Parameter | Type | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `nodeName` | `string` | node name value used by the helper. |

## Returns

A `GraphMethodDecorator` value.

## Example

```ts
import { OnGraphEvent } from "@graphrefly/ts/adapters/nestjs";
```

## Source

`packages/ts/src/adapters/nestjs.ts`
